reviews.review_description:
I've been using this game for months, and I've purchased the new "Flash and Endless Mode Update" content. However every time I start a workout that includes the Flash mode, the game freezes, and that completely ruined my last session.
I really hope they fix it soon, because it would've been a 5 star review, no doubt about it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words about the game and for supporting us by purchasing the Flash and Endless Mode Update. We're really sorry to hear that the Flash mode freezing issue ruined your session — that's definitely not the experience we want you to have. Through our investigation, we found that setting "Retained Targets" to Off may cause the game to become stuck, and we're currently working on a fix. As a quick workaround, switching "Retained Targets" to Low or High in the settings may resolve the issue immediately. If the problem persists, please reach out to us at support@thestrippers.jp with the details so we can look into it further. We sincerely appreciate your patience and support, and we're committed to delivering the full experience you deserve.

reviews.review_description: A total disappointment. I don't understand why the developers make such an obvious and easily fixable mistake. They interrupt the rhythm every three short rounds of hits, showing you the upcoming hits, but we already know! It feels like we're in an endless tutorial. An exercise that could take 10 minutes takes 25. There should also be a free-play option so we can hit the pads with whichever hand we want. I was going to buy the Flash & Endless add-on, but it seems to have the same silly and frustrating mechanics. What a shame, I hope they fix it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry the experience hasn't matched your preferred play style. Flash & Endless was designed as a more free-flowing, active experience without previews — we explored various action patterns to make it feel less structured and more fun. If you could share more about what your ideal free-play mode would look like, we'd love to hear it. That said, if you're looking for a completely unguided workout where you create your own combinations, shadow boxing might actually be the perfect fit for your skill level!

reviews.review_description: As it stands this is a very solid game, fun VR and AR options that make for a great workout. HOWEVER it would be really nice if there was a "speed" option to make it faster because sometimes it feels too slow, like the things you punch don't come up fast enough. It would just be nice to have that option. Also like another reviewer said, an "uninterrupted mode" where it doesn't show you the moves in advance would be really nice

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the thoughtful feedback! We really appreciate you pointing out the pacing issue — a speed adjustment option is definitely on our radar. The idea of an uninterrupted mode without the move preview is also a great suggestion. Your input helps a lot as we continue improving PUNCH FIT. Thanks for training with us!

reviews.review_title: This is the ideal for a "padwork" boxing
reviews.review_description:
I've been looking for a "padwork" style boxing workout, and this app totally fits the bill!! 🔥🔥💯🔥
Edit: Doing these types of workouts with a trainer can easily cost a minimum of $70 per hour 🫪

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the awesome review! We're thrilled to hear that Punch Fit delivers the padwork-style boxing experience you were looking for. You're right — getting that kind of personalized training with a trainer can be hard to access regularly, so we designed PUNCH FIT to bring that same dynamic workout right into your home whenever you need it. We really appreciate your support!

reviews.review_title: Effective yet Enjoyable which is key! 🔑
reviews.review_description: Haven’t wrote a review for an app in a while but this little exercise app is literally the perfect balance between exercise and enjoyment. Love the satisfaction you get when you hit the targets. Quite the amazing workout and LOVE that there’s no subscription whatsoever for an app that is also such a cheap price. Highly highly recommend to anyone who wants enjoyment in their VR workout for a cheap price with no subscription. 😁 Incredible work by the dev team on this! 👏

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to write such a wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that Punch Fit has struck that balance between effective exercise and genuine enjoyment for you — that's exactly what we set out to create. Your support and kind words mean the world to our team. We have a new update coming soon, so please look forward to it. Thank you for training with us! 😁

reviews.review_description:
this is the very best fitness game on meta quest right now.  
i have multiple fitness games for vr and this one is the very easiest to use and most fun you don't get tired of it nor do you get bored of it this game will get you working out and sweating 
what makes this game so easy to use is it's approachability amazing interface great graphics and just huge variety of boxing workouts

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing feedback!
We’re really happy to hear that you’re enjoying Punch Fit and that it stands out among your other fitness games.

Our goal has always been to create a boxing fitness experience that feels intuitive, approachable, and fun enough to keep coming back to—and it’s great to know that the interface, visuals, and workout variety are working as intended.

We truly appreciate your support, and we’ll continue working to make the experience even better.
Thanks for training with us!

reviews.review_description:
This game is excellent. Perfect for HIIT.

I think it could provide better feedback on technique. Like detecting at what angle the punches land, and if possible, detecting when you move your head forward significantly while punching as this is generally not a good thing while boxing. I know nothing about boxing, so maybe ask a professional what sort of feedback would be useful.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the excellent review!
We're really happy to hear you're enjoying the game.
We truly appreciate you sharing your thoughts — your feedback means a lot to us.
Thanks again for taking the time!

reviews.review_description: Stupit and boring gameplay.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry PUNCH FIT didn't meet your expectations. We're always working to add more variety and make the experience more engaging. If you have specific suggestions, we'd love to hear them — your input helps us improve.

reviews.review_description: Long workouts . Underrated. Fun

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review!
We’re really happy you’re enjoying the game.
We truly appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
I try to play this game for 30ish minutes at a time for some fun exercise when I get the time. I tend to use the MR version of the game so I can see my surroundings more, which is also great. There is a bug I noticed that when the retained targets is turned off in settings, that the targets disappear when hit (as expected) but sometime during my sessions (around halfway through a 30 min session), the all the targets are retained and do not disappear. Other than this bug, I would give it 5 stars but until then, for me, the retained targets get too distracting.

I also saw a review that mentioned the idea of uninterrupted version, where the targets highlight before needing to be hit. This sounds like a great idea, and would love to try it too!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your thoughtful feedback and for spending time with the MR version.
We’ll look into the issue where the targets remain visible even when “Retained Targets” is turned off as soon as possible.
Your idea about an uninterrupted mode sounds great, and we’ll definitely keep it in mind as we continue improving PUNCH FIT.
Thank you again for your support and for sharing your experience with us!

reviews.review_title: Sudden issues make it hard to play
reviews.review_description:
I will change my review if the devs fix the issues that have popped up in this game. I love this game but It's basically unplayable with the screen suddenly freezing at random - have to quit and reopen. The pieces that I've hit start stacking up in my vision so they are literally in the way, that's so frustrating! They used to fly about the room and stack up away from my circle of play but now they are right in front of my face and a massive umwanted distraction. They still stack up away from me too - it's nothing to do with my settings, its just that now it's also happening right inside the play area. The selector from my gloves (I'm not quite sure how to word this correctly) which I use to choose the workout or select anything in game doesn't reach the menu, I have to constantly reset my view and move my glove around in the hopes that at some point it'll hit the menu and allow me to make a workout choice etc. 

Please fix the game 🙏 It's honestly so frustrating when I know how awesome this game can be but in it's current state for whatever reason it's difficult to play. I'm annoyed that it's cost me $ and I can see from other recent reviews that I'm not the only one with these kinds of issues. It worked perfectly before...I'm guessing that it's due to a recent update. Please roll it back!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share this detailed feedback. We’re sorry to hear about the freezing issues, target stacking inside your play area, and the glove selector not reaching the menu. These are not the experiences we want for our players.
We’re currently investigating the cause, as these problems have not been reproducible in our internal environment, and we’re reviewing recent changes to identify what might have introduced them. We’ll work to improve stability and restore the smooth play you’ve enjoyed before.
We greatly appreciate your patience and understanding while we address these issues.

reviews.review_description: Every time I launch the game, it keeps asking me to "set up my space." Not sure what is going on. Keeps asking me to draw a wall?? Can't seem to play the game now.

developer_response.body: Thank you for reporting this issue. It sounds like the MR boundary setup is being requested repeatedly when launching the game. Please make sure your room setup is completed in the Meta Quest’s system settings, not just inside the app. If possible, could you share more details about your setup (device model, OS version, and whether MR mode was selected)? This will help us investigate the cause more precisely.

reviews.review_title: It would be better w uninterrupted mode
reviews.review_description:
It would be great to add another option to Normal and Hard, so that it wouldn't show all the moves in advance (and interrupt the flow), but instead just highlight the tiles you need to hit from start to finish of the selected training. With all the breaks in regular Hard mode it's not as intensive as I would like (e.g. compared to FitXR box).

Also the side dodge visualization might be better as triangle or in different colors for each side or something like that, because maybe it's just me, but sometimes I start to dodge left and realize late that it should be to the right (which sometimes twists my knee a bit, unless I'm standing a bit wider).

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback.
We really appreciate your thoughts on uninterrupted training flow and clearer dodge visualization. Your input is very valuable to us, and we will keep it in mind as we continue improving the app. Thanks again for your support, and we hope you’ll keep enjoying PUNCH FIT!

reviews.review_description:
I wanted to add something fun to the workout.

And paid $4 to add lag to my workout. The guard adds nothing of value to the workout but extra seconds waiting for the punch. 

I can literally Ignore it and just guard up is normal stance and get every block. 

So essentially… it does nothing for my workout. Will be turning it off. 

Don’t buy the DLc. The game itself is good 4* for sure. I like it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest feedback.
We’re sorry to hear the Guard feature didn’t meet your expectations. It was designed to add a defensive challenge and simulate real sparring tension, but we understand it may not fit everyone’s playstyle. Your input is very helpful as we continue refining optional features.
We’re glad to hear you still enjoy the core game, and we’ll keep working to make it even better.

reviews.review_description: I played this game EVERYDAY, but the game stopped working for me. I have over 10 years of boxing experience, this game does not disappoint. Except for right now, because it’s broken. Please fix it !

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your continued support and your kind words about the game.
We’re very sorry to hear it stopped working for you — that must be incredibly frustrating, especially as a daily player. Could you let us know what exactly happens when you try to launch the game? Any details you can share will help us fix the issue as quickly as possible.
We truly appreciate your patience and boxing spirit!

reviews.review_description: Game doesn’t work. Will start a workout and the game will freeze and crash after about a minute every time. I recommend passing on this game until it’s fixed

developer_response.body:
We’re very sorry for the crashes you’ve encountered. We are aware of this problem, but since it doesn’t reproduce on our side, it has been difficult to pinpoint the cause. Right now we’re working urgently on updates to investigate and improve stability.
Also, if you happen to be using the Public Test Channel (alpha OS), switching back to the regular OS may help. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

reviews.review_description:
Just bought…froze in the tutorial, played one full game, froze on the next one…😞

Deleting…how do I get a refund? Another day of getting into the game to have it freeze.
I’ve spent more time loading than playing.

developer_response.body: We’re truly sorry to hear that the game froze multiple times during your experience. This is not the quality we aim for, and we are currently investigating the possible causes. If you're willing to share your device model and when the issue occurred, it would be a huge help to us. We’re working hard to improve stability and ensure a smoother experience for all players.

reviews.review_title: good game, but how does scoring work
reviews.review_description:
So, I know this is crazy talk, but have you considered maybe... writing something down about how scoring works, or maybe explaining things a bit, like whether punching faster (harder) increases your score, or if you have to hit the target dead center or if it doesn't really matter?  You know... instructions?

It seems like maybe speed matters, but not by more than 2-3 points.  It doesn't seem like accuracy matters at all, other than "hit the target".

developer_response.body:
Thank you for asking about the scoring system! Here’s how it works:

Accuracy is judged only by “hit or miss” — you don’t need to strike the exact center.

There are two types of hits: normal and strong, which are determined by the punch acceleration.

A strong punch gives you an additional bonus, and you’ll see a blue effect on impact when it’s successful.

You also earn combo bonuses for consecutive successful hits without mistakes.

We’ll also be adding clearer explanations about scoring inside the game. Thank you for pointing this out!

reviews.review_title: Will no longer use my MR space
reviews.review_description: Had been enjoying the game, the exorcises have been great.  But now it only shows the circle for stationary.  When I first started the game, it had me set up my room space for the first time, but I can’t get back to that.  The room is still there in the quest space setup settings and the app is set to use the spacial settings.  The only option in-game is VR or MR, but MR will only go to stationary

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry for the trouble this has caused. We’ve found that when the Public Test Channel is turned on and an alpha version of the Quest OS is installed, MR issues like this may occur.
If you are on the Public Test Channel, please consider switching back to the regular OS version, which should resolve the problem. Thank you for your patience and support.

reviews.review_description: Good training and compatibility with bhaptics TactSleeve. It would perfect if it could have also compatibility with Tactosy for hands.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad to hear you enjoyed the workout and training, as well as the compatibility with the bHaptics TactSleeve. We appreciate your suggestion regarding support for the Tactosy for hands. We’ll carefully consider this for future updates to improve your immersive training experience.

reviews.review_description: I enjoy working out with this application. Really think it could make use of of additional reaction training like a light wall or other quick reactive activity’s. Fun game, definitely check it out

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback!
We’re really glad you enjoy working out with PUNCH FIT. Your idea about adding more reaction-based training, like quick light-wall style activities, is very inspiring. Improving agility and reaction speed is an important focus for us, and your suggestion will definitely help us as we continue to evolve the app. Thanks again for your support, and we hope you’ll keep enjoying your workouts!

reviews.review_description: At this price point your game should atleast have a gym with resizable BOB dummy HEAVY BAG, DOUBLE-END BAG, SPEED BAG,ARCADE STYLE HIT MACHINE FOR A LITTLE COMPETITION AND A PLAYER VS PLAYER SPARRING SESSION (NOT NECESSARY) BUT IF YOU CAN IT WILL BE THE BEST BOXING APP.. ROOTING FOR YOU GUYS .. DON'T GET GREEDY MAKE IT ENJOYABLE AND FUN .. I give a 3 star for now (lots of room for improvement) with minimal work

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed and passionate feedback!
We really appreciate your suggestions—having gym-style elements like a heavy bag, speed bag, or even arcade-style challenges would certainly add a new layer of fun and training depth. While we can’t promise specific features at this point, we’re constantly working on making the experience more enjoyable and rewarding. Your support means a lot, and we’ll keep striving to improve PunchFit!

reviews.review_description: Just Great !

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying it. Your support means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description:
I like this game a lot I use it constantly but now I can’t because the game always crashes and freezes up. Please fix this or give me a refund on the game. 
￼

developer_response.body: We're very sorry to hear about the freezing and crashes. We haven’t yet been able to reproduce or fully understand the issue on our end, but we’re committed to investigating and working toward a solution. Thank you for your patience and for your continued support.

reviews.review_description: Don't buy this game. It is very frustrating to play because it crashes and freezes every time. It is impossible to finish one workout.  I want my money back ASAP!

developer_response.body: We’re very sorry to hear about the crashes and freezing you’ve experienced. That’s definitely not the experience we want you to have. We are currently investigating the issue, but unfortunately, we haven't been able to reproduce the crashes on our end, which makes it difficult to resolve quickly. If possible, we’d greatly appreciate it if you could provide more details about when and how the crashes occur. Your feedback would be extremely helpful in getting this fixed.

reviews.review_description:
I've installed this game out of "wow VR punching" feeling and at first I didn't paid enough attention to it. Then my colleague, 20 years of Box/Thai box, tested it and told me "you want to workout with this". So I gave it a shot - 45mins equals approx. 500kcal burned if done properly: wrist weights simulating boxing gloves, weighted vest to add a little inertia. Power increased, body movement optimized after a while! With the guard DLC, even more - took me a while to adapt to it and all the transitions are smooth. Buy the DLC, support the devs...

But there is one flaw/bug/glitch: the "ground" where things should drop once broken are sometimes at eye level, which makes it a tad convoluted. If needed devs, I can send you a picture of it.

developer_response.body:
Wow—thank you for such an awesome and thoughtful review! We're really glad you gave it another shot and even optimized your workout with wrist weights and a weighted vest—sounds like you're making the most of it!

We're especially happy to hear the Guard DLC is working well for you and that the smooth transitions are appreciated.

As for the visual glitch where the "ground" appears at eye level: thank you for flagging that. This occasionally happens due to a limitation outside the app’s control, and we’re currently looking into whether it can be addressed.

Thanks again for your support and for helping us keep improving.

reviews.review_description: I just downloaded this. Excited to play. 4 punches in and it freezes. Its doing it over and over.  Not fair to pay for a game we cannot play. Its literally unplayable.

developer_response.body: We’re very sorry to hear about the freezing issue right after starting. That must be frustrating. We are aware that some users are experiencing similar crashes, and we are actively investigating the cause to provide a fix as soon as possible. Thank you for letting us know, and we appreciate your patience while we work on this.

reviews.review_description: Completed tutorial and came back next day but it loads without any menu to do anything. Might be good if worked

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this experience. We’re sorry to hear that the menu did not appear after returning to the app. We take this feedback seriously and will continue working on stability and improvements. If possible, could you share more details about your environment so we can better investigate?

reviews.review_description:
I’ve tried a bunch of boxing and fitness apps, but this one stands out.
It feels just like training at the gym with a real coach guiding you through combo drills — no gimmicks, no unnecessary jumping jacks pretending to be boxing.
Everything is focused, clean, and made for actual boxing practice.
This is how a real boxing training app should be. 🥊

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the great review!
We're so glad to hear you felt like training with a real coach.
We tried to keep it simple and focused—just real boxing practice, no fluff.
Really appreciate the kind words! 🥊

reviews.review_title: Great concept but needs some tweaking
reviews.review_description:
Actually found this to be a really solid, fun workout. But it sorely needs an option to turn off targets (in MR) after they have been punched rather than just have them gather on the floor and furniture. It makes the background a visual mess and makes the targets harder to see. 


EDIT - Can we PLEASE get an option to turn OFF the targets once they have been punched, like punch and disappear for good .. not bounce around my furniture and walls ....  I want to love this game but the visual clutter it makes clashes with the actual punching interface. Surely an OFF button isn't that hard ???

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest and helpful feedback!

We’re really glad you’re enjoying the workout experience overall — and we hear you loud and clear about the Mixed Reality target clutter. Having lingering targets turn into visual noise is not what we intended, and we understand how that can interfere with the experience.

We want you to know that we will be adding an option to make the targets disappear instantly after being hit. This feature is now on our roadmap. Due to development scheduling, it may take a little time to release — and we sincerely appreciate your patience.

Thanks again for helping us make PUNCH FIT better!

reviews.review_description: Game has not worked since I first installed

developer_response.body: Thank you for letting us know. We’re very sorry to hear that the game has not worked since installation. We take this feedback seriously and will continue working to improve stability.

reviews.review_description: The game is great. I get a great cardio-based workout, but it freezes sooo much it has become unplayable. Please fix. I'm on Oc 2

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind feedback about the workout itself. We're aware from several reviews that some users are experiencing frequent freezing, and we're doing our best to investigate and fix the issue. However, we’ve been struggling to reproduce the freezing on our own devices, which is making the investigation difficult.
If you're willing to share any details—such as when during the game the freeze tends to occur—it would be a great help. We're committed to improving this as soon as possible.

reviews.review_description: Good to get you going, bunch of different workouts, bought the dlc to support the dev, would love to see a “mute music” button somewhere

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your support and encouraging feedback! We're really happy to hear the workouts helped get you moving, and we truly appreciate your DLC purchase.
As for the music — good news! You can mute it from the settings screen. We hope that helps enhance your experience even more.

reviews.review_title: Can't get it to work again
reviews.review_description: I love the game but It freezes after a couple minutes into the workout. Can you please fix the issue?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for reaching out and we're truly sorry for the frustration.

We’re aware of this issue and are currently working on an update that will help us better understand and address the situation.

We’re doing everything we can to resolve this as quickly as possible. Thank you again for your patience and support—we truly appreciate that you love the game.

reviews.review_description:
Thanks for making this simple yet effective & fun workout game, I recently started my diet and weight loss journey and this game has been making me sweat and feeling good with those awesome combos and especially the block dlc which I just bought. I also love the instrumental cool music, unlike the other apps where they have obnoxious AI music which makes it harder to enjoy.

There's a lot of workouts I have to go through but hope you guys keep updating this game and I'll definitely keep supporting it.

Recommendation, please add more levels/backgrounds/custom songs/level creator. I'd pay for a DLC with those features, it would complete this game, keep up the awesome work.

Thank you again.

*Edit: Quick question, how correct are those calorie counters? Just curious as I've seen some apps that have double the calorie counts with less effort and time. Thanks

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review and for supporting us with the Block DLC! We're thrilled to hear that Punch Fit is helping you stay active and feel great on your fitness journey.We’re also glad you’re enjoying the combos and the instrumental music — your feedback really encourages us.Thank you as well for your thoughtful suggestions. We're continuing to work on future updates, so please stay tuned.Thanks again for your support — we’ll keep doing our best to make Punch Fit even more enjoyable!

reviews.review_description: If you LIKE boxing training, this game is definitely WORTH buying!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the enthusiastic recommendation! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the game and that it's a solid pick for boxing fans. Your support means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: Thank you for making this game it makes me sweat a lot and honestly this game makes me wanna start using my punching bag again since I dont have gear this game is good to replace for a while. :]

developer_response.body:
We're thrilled to hear that Punch Fit is helping you work up a sweat! 💪
It’s awesome that it’s even motivating you to get back to your punching bag. We hope Punch Fit can continue to support your training, even while you’re without gear. Thanks for the great feedback!

reviews.review_description:
I now use this daily, and it gets me sweating every day. I've lost 10.5 pounds in 3 weeks. This has definitely played a big part in that as well as a more healthy diet. Who would have thought losing weight could be fun. Just wish there  where more options available for the music, and maybe in time, it will have the same move to music as beat saber and other such games and maybe at some point you won't have to use controllers. I recommend it to all.
5☆ 🥊🥊🥊🥊🥊

Well, after my golden review, I nearly amputated my pinky finger on a broken glass in the sink. Hey,ho... but wait... I come back to find the guard add-on , so now, with my little bellringer fully trussed up with elastoplast and duck tape, I'm back. ( can't keep a good ..... you know the one.) So jumped straight in hardest settings(well, for where i am in the grand scheme of things anyway). If I'm honest, it chewed me up and spat me out. My short time away had definitely taken its toll. So I dropped it down a few gears and, yep, found that flow, till sweating and gassed out. All good, well done. Keep up the good work, I'm a lifetime user from now. Physical ability permitting. Need to sort this music situation out. I did the YouTube as bgm but absolutely mullered my battery, and the one on the headset couldn't keep up. More upbeat ,I'd say, more aggressive,but that's just my preference. I think I'm going to have to fully shut off from the world in my next workout and stream to my buds off my phone.  
5☆🥊🥊🥊🥊🥊(still)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your amazing review! We're thrilled to hear that PunchFit has become a daily habit and contributed significantly to your impressive weight loss. Your suggestions about expanding music options and incorporating music-synced movements and controller-free play are excellent and align perfectly with our future plans. We'll strive to continue making your fitness journey fun and engaging. Keep up the great work!

reviews.review_description: The Guard feature doesn't work. Every time I block or get hit the boxing glove remains on screen. It piles up in seconds making it unplayable. Just so frustrating, please fix this.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and for supporting the game. We're very sorry to hear about the issue with the Guard feature. At this time, we haven’t been able to reproduce the problem on our side.

If you’re willing, we’d greatly appreciate it if you could share more details with us at store@strippers.jp. Your input would be a big help in resolving this issue.

reviews.review_description: This is by far one of my favorite Fitness game. Simple but very effective. Mixed reality makes it even better . I also like that it's straight to the point,, no dance move crap or Rhythm beatboxing ..just great Hard Knocks boxing. I recommend this to anyone who's looking for a good workout.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing 5-star review! We're thrilled that you enjoy the straightforward, hard-hitting boxing experience and appreciate the Mixed Reality feature. Your support and recommendation mean a lot to us — we'll keep working to deliver even better workouts!

reviews.review_description:
Really enjoyed getting into the game and felt I was using a good amount of energy. Three times it glicthed after 9 minutes of play and nothing I did changed the frozen screen except coming out and going back in again. This meant aspects of it were lost and when I again tried to use it the same thing happened. 
Very disappointing as what I did get to do was a lot of fun. Hoping the glitch is fixed and I can review with more stars

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your detailed feedback. We’re very sorry to hear about the glitches after around 9 minutes of play. We haven’t been able to reproduce this issue consistently in our test environment, so your report is very helpful. We’ll continue investigating the cause and working on a fix. We’re glad to hear you enjoyed the workout itself, and we hope we can resolve this soon so you can enjoy it without interruptions.

reviews.review_description: It's a pretty good workout I used it to get me prepped for thrill of the fight and it did a great job at that. Thrill of the fight is by far a harder cardio workout but I think this gives you more of a full body workout. The combo of the two is amazing. I'm about to add the guard hope it increases my workout. Oh by the way bought it for the wife to she absolutely loves it. Great job guys keep it coming looking forward to your new creations.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the great feedback! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the full-body workout, and it’s wonderful that your wife loves it too! Adding Guard Actions introduces a more technical aspect to your training, while also enhancing the overall intensity and focus. We truly appreciate your support and look forward to delivering more exciting updates!

reviews.review_description:
Bought this game as it was recommended for cardio training, well they got it wrong, while doing the tutorial the game was freezing, then when I finally got through it I couldn’t do anything, the game is obviously broken and not worthy of a good review, seriously developers of this game should already know there is a problem and fix it.

Will be looking for a refund

developer_response.body:
We’re very sorry to hear about your experience, and we completely understand your frustration. This is not the kind of first impression we want to give. Thank you for taking the time to report the issue—it helps us a lot.
We’ve addressed all the known issues to the best of our ability, and we have not been able to confirm any widespread cases where the game becomes completely unplayable. We’ve put together a troubleshooting guide for known problems, and if that doesn’t solve the issue, we’d really appreciate it if you could share more details so we can investigate further.
Thank you again for your feedback.

https://the.strippers.jp/punch-fit-troubleshooting-guide

reviews.review_description:
I love playing this game, now use it more than Les Mills body combat, love the new guard add on,
Look forward to see what’s next,

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're really happy to hear you're enjoying the game and the new Guard feature. We’ll keep doing our best to refine the experience step by step. Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: For the longest time, my go-to fitness game was Les Mills body combat but now I have tried this game again after more than a few years and I have to say that it is a much better experience than what it used to be. I have now added this to my daily workout routine. Now if only I could get someone to hit me back 🤣.

developer_response.body:
Welcome back — and thank you for the kind words!

We’re thrilled to hear that Punch Fit has improved enough to earn a place in your daily routine, especially coming from a longtime Les Mills fan. That’s high praise!

As for getting hit back… who knows what the future holds? 😄 Until then, we’ll keep delivering punches your way!

reviews.review_title: Brilliant game but no longer working
reviews.review_description:
I love this game and have played pretty much every day but it crashed on Saturday 15th and no longer works. Game loads but then just met with dark screen with logo.  I have tried deleting and reinstalling/ hard resets etc but with no joy .   
Please fix as it really is a great game

Please advise if  issue will be resolved soon ? I can see there was an update a couple of days ago but game still won’t load , thanks

Working now 😊 after advice from developer to clear app data

Guard unlock has taken this already brilliant game to a higher lever .. even more challenging and a great workout

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words and for playing every day! We’re really sorry about the crash on the 15th, but we’re glad to hear the issue was resolved after clearing the app data. We appreciate your patience and understanding. It means a lot to know that Guard Unlock made the experience even better for you — we hope you continue to enjoy the challenge and the workout!

reviews.review_description:
Very good app. It's simplistic which makes it more engaging. Basically you are swinging your arms in boxing moves from hooks and jabs to uppercuts and there are dodging objects included to give your whole body a workout. Love that you can select how long you want the workout to be and you can unlock fancy boxing gloves to use to make it more fun. 
Very good value for money. 🥊😀

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review! We're thrilled that you're enjoying the simplicity and intensity of the workouts, and it’s great to hear that the dodging elements and glove unlocks are adding extra fun. We’ll keep working to make it even better—thanks for training with us! 🥊

reviews.review_description:
My arms and legs were spent. I wanted to go further but couldn't.

Another great thing about this game is that the sfx, trainer voice, and music each have their own volume control. The music isn't bad, but I rather listen to my own music either with earbuds or Spotify through the Quest's browser.

Devs, I have two suggestions:

1. There should be a mode that is like Whack-a-Mole. No preview, just that the pads appear randomly, and you must punch them before they fall. It could set for time or set for the number of pads you wish to punch.

2. Incorporate hand tracking so we can use hand weights with the game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the fantastic feedback and creative suggestion! We'll consider your "Whack-a-Mole" idea in future updates. Also, glad to hear the customizable audio settings are enhancing your experience. Keep punching, and thanks for playing!

reviews.review_title: guard addon being paid is kinda bs
reviews.review_description: Literally why?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your honest feedback — we understand the frustration.
The guard feature is a newly developed optional addon that required significant cost and effort. To be transparent, the project isn’t profitable at this stage.
Instead of raising the base price, we chose to offer optional features so that users can customize their experience as needed. We believe this makes it more flexible and sustainable for everyone. We truly appreciate your understanding.

reviews.review_description: First time playing this game at the time of writing this: That is one of the best workouts I have had in my entire life. Shallow gameplay and mediocre graphics but fun gameplay abd satisfying movements

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback and for giving Punch Fit a try! We're thrilled to hear you had such a great workout experience. While we know the graphics are simple, we focus on delivering fun and effective movements that really make you sweat. We hope you'll keep enjoying the gameplay and see how it evolves as you explore more workouts!

reviews.review_title: Great app, but MR is broken today
reviews.review_description:
It’s been a great exercise app, been playing daily.
BUT today (it looks like it updated),
Mixed Reality stops working when you start an excerise! (it flips out of MR and goes into the ‘gym’)

Please fix !! this is a show stopper for me 😞

developer_response.body:
Thank you for always playing our app! We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

It seems that an unexpected bug was introduced in the latest update. We have confirmed the issue on our end and are working to resolve it as soon as possible. A fix will be released in an upcoming update.

Please bear with us for a little while. We deeply apologize for this issue.

reviews.review_description:
I love this app. I don't even know if I paid it, but if I did it was the cheapest app I ever bought on Meta. And probably, among all the boxing/fitness apps I own, it's the one I prefer: no multiplayer, no motivating speeches, no crappy music, no agendas about body positivity o inclusivity, no simulated human contact, no dancing. Just a bunch of octagons to crash at your own pace in a retro robotic neon environment.

Also, the fact that there are no cues coming towards you but just a combo to memorize develops short-term memory too, like a game of Simon.

I'm coming back every day to complete the daily missions, and so far it's been a blast.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your incredible review! We’re thrilled that you enjoy the simplicity and focus of PUNCH FIT. It’s great to hear that the gameplay resonates with you and that the combo system adds an extra layer of challenge. Your dedication to completing daily missions inspires us to keep delivering a great experience. Thanks for being part of the community!

reviews.review_description: Can’t fault this for price, I use it every day and look forward to my next session. Really good work out and glad I discovered it. Spoke too soon game won’t load any more and in other reviews people are saying the same, can’t seem to find any support 🤷🏻‍♂️

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback! We are thrilled to hear that you use PUNCH FIT every day and enjoy your workouts. Your support motivates us to keep improving and providing the best experience possible. Keep up the great work, and we hope you continue to have fun with each session!

reviews.review_title: Great App, but no more working!
reviews.review_description:
I‘ve been using this app for the last several months but it somehow crashed and stopped working. Please help! I sent an email at both info(at)stripper and store(at)stripper but haven't received any feedback.

Ah it works again!! So great!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! We're glad to hear the app is working again for you. Sorry for the inconvenience you experienced and the delayed response to your emails. If you encounter any other issues, please don't hesitate to reach out again. Happy training!

reviews.review_description: The app mechanics are good but why i should always see the demonstration of hits that i just need to blindly repeat. This is  not really interesting. I just want to hit blocks without any breaks and demonstrations. I didn't find any way to disable demos so every time i see the blocks that i would need to hit. Why can't you add a mode where i can just hit random blocks without repeating stupid patterns? This is the same mistake Fruit Ninja 2 did when they didn't transfer the mode where you can just hit fruits without stupid interruptions until you make 3-5 mistakes.  Just add the mode where i can quickly hit blocks that appear randomly and make scoring by time reaction. This would be very interesting and i would rate the app as 5. For now, it is very boring to repeat what the app told you so there is not much fun and joy. Half of the time i just spectate the demo instead of actually exercising

developer_response.body: Thank you for the valuable feedback! We understand your desire to dive into the action without seeing demonstrations. In fact, we've received similar suggestions from other users. However, simply removing the demo and presenting targets in the current format doesn’t always result in a fun or engaging experience — we’ve tested this internally. That said, we’re actively researching and developing new modules that can deliver a more free-flowing, reaction-based workout experience. We truly appreciate your input as it helps shape future updates!

reviews.review_description: Soooo much better having to block in-between throwing punches!  Well worth the price!

developer_response.body: Thanks a ton for the great feedback! We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the Guard addon — mixing in blocks really does take the workout and gameplay to another level. Keep punching strong! 🥊

reviews.review_description: A great game with great feel and I love it but one thing I have seen is people dont like the role model that tells you how to hit. people can obviously play other games but I think it would be good to have a mode like arcade where you just punch until you miss with no role model or something like that. or a rhythmic mode where the beat and punches match with no role model and the octagons come in like Beat Saber. besides that though the game is great and I will definitely keep playing and also the leaderboard is great but a ranked mode would be even better.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your thoughtful feedback and creative suggestions! We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the game and have noted your ideas for an arcade mode and rhythmic mode. These are exciting concepts we’ll consider for future updates. We appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_title: Punch your way to fitness fun
reviews.review_description:
Hi I picked this game up in the winter sale for £1.99 and I’m so glad I did 
It has loads of workouts to play from 1 min to over 50 to keep you busy 
The game also has mixed reality which is great (so you don’t punch walls or people 😊) 

I have played it everyday since I got it 
I think people should pick it up at the sale price and give it a go it will surprise you how fun it is

developer_response.body: Thank you for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the variety of workouts and the mixed reality feature. It's fantastic that you've made PUNCH FIT a part of your daily routine. We appreciate your recommendation and hope you continue to have fun punching your way to fitness!

reviews.review_title: After the update, there is no mr mode
reviews.review_description:
As title 

After the latest update, there is no MR mode. Please follow up

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We have confirmed the issue with MR mode and are actively working on a fix. An update will be released soon, so please bear with us a little longer. We appreciate your continued support.

reviews.review_description: This game is great warmup before going to boxing VR game

developer_response.body: Thank you! Glad to hear it's a great warm-up before your boxing VR sessions—keep enjoying your workouts!

reviews.review_description: Everyday I use it

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support! We're thrilled to hear that you're using it every day. We'll continue working hard to make it even better for you!

reviews.review_description:
I love the workout this game provides, however I think the age group for this game needs to changed from Everyone and re-evaluated as some of the music included lyrics that included the F word and the N word.

For now, I turned off the music.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and for pointing out the concerns regarding the lyrics. We take your feedback seriously and will strive to improve the game accordingly.

reviews.review_description: Very fun to use to workout in. I like the new daily and weekly challenges. I don't really like the music that comes with the app but I just start Pandora or Spotify playing in the background and it makes the app very fun to dance to the music and hot things.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! We're thrilled that you're enjoying the daily and weekly challenges. We understand that music preferences vary, and we encourage using services like Pandora or Spotify to play your favorite music while enjoying the app. We hope to integrate this feature into the app in the future. Keep having fun and hitting those goals!

reviews.review_description:
I love that it is in mixed reality, which makes it easy to workout and not punch the lights out of your surroundings, its boxing, dodging and cardio and great fun. The music tracks are cool and its a great workout all round  highly recommend for lovers of Thrill of the fight or Creed as a pure workout game.
More updates to come hopefully with a few more modes.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your wonderful review! Your support is truly encouraging for us. We will continue to add new features and modes to enhance your experience, so please look forward to future updates!

reviews.review_description: Love this game. It is on my daily list. A good workout. Daily and weekly challenges. Compete against others on the leaderboard.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great review! We're thrilled to hear that PUNCH FIT is part of your daily routine and that you enjoy the challenges and competition. Keep pushing yourself and climbing the leaderboard! 🥊🔥

reviews.review_description:
Playing on Q3, I really like this AP. No subscriptions and offers a good range of excersises. It's everything I wish for and makes me keep comming back.

Only downside is that it buggy and randomly gets stuck and needs an restart  or crashes back to the dashboard a little to offten.

But hey, it's dirt cheap and still  delivers.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your thoughtful review! We're really happy to hear you're enjoying the app and finding it worthwhile.
We're very mindful of bugs and crashes, so it's concerning to hear that it's happening frequently on your end. In our tests and user reports, such issues haven't occurred often, so if you're able to share when or how it tends to happen, we'd really appreciate it. That would help us track it down and improve the experience further. Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description:
Free boxer trainer done really well. 

Would be great to add hand tracking so I can hold weights while playing

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’ll definitely consider your suggestion to add hand tracking in the future to enhance your experience even further.

reviews.review_description: I couldn't finish any workout because it keeps on freezing.  Wish I can return it.

developer_response.body: We're very sorry to hear about the freezing issues and that it’s preventing you from completing your workouts. This is certainly not the experience we want for our users. We're actively investigating the cause and working on a fix. If you're open to it, we’d appreciate details about your device model and when the freezes happen, so we can resolve this as quickly as possible.

reviews.review_description: Really good £7.99 worth every penny

developer_response.body: Thank you! Glad you’re enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: 5 star game. Just a suggestion to add expert mode and keep all the octagon blocks up to really test your memory

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion! We will consider adding features that offer more challenging gameplay. It's a great idea, and we'll take it into account for the future!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been playing PUNCH FIT on Steam for years and only remembered this launched on Oculus yesterday so I decided to buy it to compare.

I am quite passionate about this particular game so I’ll do a detailed review below, but if the devs happen to see this I’ll also be leaving some feedback/suggestions if you’re interested! 

GAME REVIEW:

I’ll start by saying I mainly bought this app out of principle. As I said initially, I’ve been playing the Steam version for years now and it’s my first choice every time for a simple yet effective VR workout. I gets the sweat pouring in a matter of minutes and can help build endurance levels like nothing else. The fact that it’s free on Steam and is still getting updates from the devs speaks volumes to their commitment to their work. 
The other main reason for getting the paid version on the store was because of the addition of MR, which works amazingly well on Quest 3. It’s also nice not have to set up Steam Link to play and fiddle with the setup for 5 mins just to get started.

Honestly, the implementation of MR along with in this was enough to make the price tag worth it, even if it was just a straight port.
I was pleasantly surprised to see some nice additions and positive tweaks to the gameplay/UI however, which I’ll list below:
- There are TON of new levels/workouts compared to the Steam version
- Addition of Daily and Weekly quests
- Token system along with Sweatpoints earned from quests as well as from workouts
- Improved UI and in-game direction (I noticed and appreciated that the ‘coach’/narrator now says things like “2 to go” instead of “One more. One more. One more. Last.” as that drives me nuts when I’m exhausted between combos in the Steam version
- Additions of Milestones/Medals to add an extra achievement tracking system

There may be additions/changes I’ve missed or haven’t seen yet, as I’ve only played about 1-2 hours at the time of this review.
I happily started over from scratch in this paid version and started working my way up again. 

I do have some feedback and suggestions for the Devs which I’ll leave further below. I’m not including those in the review as there’s really nothing negative I can say about this game as of right now.

SUMMARY/TL;DR:
Whether you’re new to PUNCH FIT or have experience the Steam version, or you’re just looking for a good VR workout or a cathartic boxing simulator, I genuinely and wholeheartedly recommend PUNCH FIT! It’s a no brainer, BUY IT! 

It’s perfect for all fitness levels and the vast array of workouts (which can be sorted by difficulty/length) range from just a minute each to almost an hour! 

Thank you Devs for this game and for continuing to evolve it, you are amongst the top MVPs in the industry to day as far as I’m concerned. No micro-transactions or inflated price tag, just a great, solid game/workout app. Please do continue to do amazing work and further develop this gem.

FEEDBACK/SUGGESTIONS

Again, this isn’t to deter anyone from buying the game as these are just things I’d personally like to see:

- Unlocking Gloves Process / Challenges:
In the Steam version, it only costs 10,000 Sweatpoints to unlock a new pair of gloves, which can be achieved after just 2-3 short workouts. That’s been increased to 100,000 in the Quest version however. I do understand and appreciate this is to fit in the daily/weekly quests however, but especially for the sake of people who aren’t ready for the longer workout levels, it can be a bit much. 
For example, I couldn’t achieve all of todays quests as for one I needed to chain at least 200 punches in a single level. As it’s been a while, I started from the bottom with the minute workouts (plus having ADHD I prefer to go in succession) so I won’t be able to do that until I’m doing a workout for at least 5 minutes I reckon. Would be nice to have quests scale and level up the more workouts you do to add depth to the player’s sense of progression.

- Workout Progress Indication 
I like that you can bookmark workouts, as it gave me a way to ‘tick off’ the ones I’d completed. That being said, I’d love to have that simplified. Would be great if completed levels had a border of sorts and perhaps the last achieved stats/results shown on their cards. I feel like it would add an extra sense of achievement as well as extra motivation as you complete workouts and see what’s left to work towards.

- Custom Music/Playlists
The devs attempted implementing YouTube in the Steam version at one stage, which unfortunately had to be removed due to the technical issues getting it to work consistently. It wasn’t an issue though as I could just have YouTube running on my desktop while I played for the same effect. 
I’d love it if the Quest version could load music files placed somewhere on the headset if connected to PC. I feel like this could be easier to implement than YouTube.

- Impact Level Indicators
I always wondered when playing in Steam if the game could tell the different between a light and a heavy punch. I noticed when playing the Quest version that I got an achievement for ‘X Amount of Heavy Punches’ but there still doesn’t seem to be a way to tell when you hit hard or not. 
Just an addition of a simple graphic or different colour of impact light to show the intensity of the punch would be greatly rewarding IMO.

- Customisable Targets
Sometimes the positions of the punch targets seem a bit too far from each other. I can’t speak for others, but when I’m playing I’m in the headset of ‘I’m in a fight/boxing match’ or ‘I’m training to fight’. When I do an uppercut or a hook I often snap out of the immersion because ADHD/instincts tell me “that would’ve probably missed if you were fighting a person” because I’m turning to face them or my fist is going too far to the side.
Could be a great feature if players could change the distance of the targets to be closer together.

- Extra Play Modes
Now hear me out. The base game is finger licking good. But imagine if there were a couple extra play modes to add some ‘sugar’ and ‘spice’, along with all of that ‘nice’? 
First suggestion: Boxing Dummy mode - instead of the standard targets, you have one of those mannequin heads with a torso, and the targets appear on the face, cheeks, chin or ribs for the respective punch prompts. This would be great for actual training and precision. 
Second Suggestion: Survival Mode - Again, instead of the usual targets, you could have a Guitar Hero/Beat Saber style conveyor of targets come at you at increasingly difficult speeds until to miss like 3 times and then / miss too many and you’re out, followed by a summary and maybe a leaderboard feature. 
I’d personally be much more motivated to play more often if there was more variety to how to play.

I could go on, but those are my main suggestions that would make this gold standard into platinum standard for me.

To the devs or whoever read through all of this, thanks for taking the time and another thank you for this game. It’s benefitted me on more levels than just physical fitness. Keep up the incredible work!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for playing PUNCH FIT for so long. We also greatly appreciate the valuable feedback and suggestions you've provided. We'll consider them for future updates.

We are committed to delivering an even better experience for all players. Please continue to enjoy PUNCH FIT, and feel free to share any new ideas or feedback. Your support is what helps us make this game even better.

Thank you again!

reviews.review_description: amazing game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your amazing review! We're thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the game. Keep having fun and keep up the great work! 🥊💪

reviews.review_description: This is a solid 10/10 workout game

developer_response.body:
Thanks.
Enjoy!

reviews.review_description: Great! I will recommend this app to all of my Oculus friends.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much.
I hope many of you will play the game.

reviews.review_title: Wow this is a great workout!
reviews.review_description: I just stumbled upon this game this morning and was dripping sweat by the time I stopped trying it out. It not only worked out my body, it worked my mind out too because I had to try and remember all the different sequences. Even though it only has one stance shown I changed my stances up between orthodox, center and southpaw to work all my muscles. The only thing I can think of that would make this even better would be an option to turn up the feedback on my controllers so I get a more satisfying feeling when hitting targets. A big thanks to the creators of this game! It’ll definitely be one I play on a daily basis.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review. 
We are glad you chose PunchFit for your daily game. 
The feedback on the controller is turned on, but I'll see if I can make it vibrate louder.

reviews.review_description: I really like this game, but my only complaint is the targets are positioned a little bit too low (I'm 5'8), and there does not seem to be any option in the settings menu to adjust their height. Is there any way to do that?

developer_response.body:
Press and hold the Oculus button on the right controller to reset the position.
Try it.

reviews.review_description:
Love this Game! I was searching for a fitness app without monthly subscription and I found this by accident. I was a boxer some years ago and I like the movements and feeling a lot of core muscle strengthen. Can absolutely recommend this, doesn't feel like a free game!

Only wish I have (like many others here) is a "reaction" mode, where you just have to hit targets...maybe just showing the amount of targets and than react.

But at the Developers: thanks for this Game !!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much.
We are looking into something like a "reaction" mode. We are a small team, so it will take time to develop. Please be patient.

reviews.review_description: Different concept than Fitxr, as one has to memorize combos before executing them. Love it, good exercise for the body and the mind.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much.
Enjoy.

reviews.review_description:
Easy to follow
And fun

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Honestly. I just finished a stint with Punch Fit and I'm able to type this because my desk is holding my arms up.

The day after the first time I played it I could feel muscles I haven't used in a long time. Even though I had started playing TOTF recently, I still had muscle activated that it didn't.

However, I felt like the cardio wasn't as good as TOTF. That was because I hadn't tried the right exercise. I just finished one called "short rush".

By the end (3 minutes) I thought my heart was going to explode and my arms were going to fall off. I had to basically swing my body to get my arms to throw the last few punches haha.

It also has some gamification where you earn drops of sweat which opens new boxing gloves. Pretty cool.

I would absolutely pay for this game. So picking it up while it's free is a no-brainer.

developer_response.body: I'm glad you had a sweaty good time.
